title: More Minecraft
description: Adds Lots of New Things To the Game
body:
**Adds Lots of cool things to minecraft**

## Features
<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

- Sticky Book
- Honey Slime (More_minecraft:HS)
- Slime Helmet
- Slime Chestplate
- Slime Leggings
- Slime Boots
- Slime Scraper
- Shot Bow
- Cooked Coal
- Power Pickaxe
- Power Shovel
- Music Disc : Hidden
- Potion of Mommy My Tummy Hurts

</details>


<details>
<summary>Advancements</summary>

- More of Minecraft
- A Big Sticky Situaion
- A Waste of Snow

</details>


<details>
<summary>Biomes</summary>
  
- Snowy Wasteland
- Spookey Forest



</details>

<details>
<summary>Strutures</summary>

- Blizzard Ruins
- Dark Point

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>
  
- Honey


</details>

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>
  
- /Boom


</details>

<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>

- Curse of Dying

</details>

<details>
<summary>Villager Jobs</summary>

- Sticky Worker

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dimensions</summary>

- Sticky Dimension

</details>
